headline: Samsung Electronics Deepens AI And Connectivity Role With New Partnerships
summary: Samsung Electronics announced new collaborations with Cadence Design Systems and Synopsys on second and third generation 2nm process technology for advanced AI chips. The company is working with Broadcom on what it describes as the industry's first unified Wi-Fi 8 and 5G fixed wireless access platform for broadband equipment.
